My biggest piece of advice to prevent it from flaking off or getting soggy is to use watercolor paper. I’ve used printer paper and cardstock, and it just doesn’t work as well in my opinion.

title: Frozen Aquarium
description: Description:  Children explore a frozen block filled with small sea animals. They can touch, tap, or use tools to try and “rescue” the animals from the ice.    Rationale:  This activity supports sensory exploration and fine motor skills. Children feel the cold ice, see colors and textures, and work their hand muscles while trying to melt or chip the ice. title:
Have you ever done salt painting with your kids?! It’s one of our favorite activities (and you probably have everything you need to do it already on hand)! 🐚

My biggest piece of advice to prevent it from flaking off or getting soggy is to use watercolor paper. I’ve used printer paper and cardstock, and it just doesn’t work as well in my opinion.

title: Frozen Aquarium
description: Description:  Children explore a frozen block filled with small sea animals. They can touch, tap, or use tools to try and “rescue” the animals from the ice.    Rationale:  This activity supports sensory exploration and fine motor skills. Children feel the cold ice, see colors and textures, and work their hand muscles while trying to melt or chip the ice. It encourages curiosity and problem-solving, which fits with Reggio Emilia’s focus on children as natural explorers.
